metadata.title: Landing Template
metadata.description: A modular landing page template built with reusable sections and components.
navbar.title: Landing Template
home.heroTitleHtml:
This is a landing page template
with reusable
components
home.description: Use this base as a starting point to quickly launch new campaign pages.
home.description2: Easy to customize, conversion-oriented, and built on a modular structure.
services.titleHtml: Everything you need in a modular template
services.description: Each section is built from reusable components to speed up delivery, keep visual consistency, and simplify customization.
services.features.reusableBlocks.title: Reusable Blocks
services.features.reusableBlocks.descrip: Hero sections, benefit sections, cards, and carousels ready to combine into new pages.
services.features.quickCustomization.des: Swap copy, colors, images, and CTAs without changing the template's core structure.
services.features.scalableCampaigns.desc: Reuse the same components across multiple campaigns with a consistent visual standard.
carousel.titleHtml:
Build pages with reusable components and launch
new variations with more speed
carousel.items.item1: This template was designed to serve as the base for multiple projects, reducing rework when building new landing pages.
carousel.items.item2: Standardized components make maintenance, testing, and visual evolution easier across different campaigns.
carousel.items.item3: You can combine ready-made sections to create complete pages without rebuilding the layout from scratch.
carousel.items.item4: The modular structure makes reuse easier across different languages, products, and audiences.
carousel.items.item5: Each component was designed to fit a real landing page flow: presentation, proof, and conversion.
benefits.features.instantReuse.title: Instant Reuse
benefits.features.instantReuse.descripti: Use the existing components to assemble new pages in less time.
benefits.features.visualConsistency.desc: Keep a consistent standard across campaigns by reusing the same blocks, styles, and structure.
benefits.features.easyAdaptation.title: Easy to Adapt
benefits.features.easyAdaptation.descrip: Edit only the content and visual identity to turn the template into a page for your brand.
timeline.items.chooseComponents.title: Choose the components your campaign needs
timeline.items.chooseComponents.descript: Define which template blocks will be used: hero, benefits, social proof, and calls to action.
timeline.items.customizeContent.title: Customize copy, images, and visual identity
timeline.items.customizeContent.descript: Adjust the content for your product while keeping the same reusable structure.
timeline.items.publishVariations.title: Publish new variations quickly
timeline.items.publishVariations.descrip: Use the template as a base to launch pages for different offers and audiences fast.
timeline.items.validateResults.title: Validate results and improve the components
timeline.items.validateResults.descripti: With a shared foundation, it becomes easier to compare tests and improve each reusable block.
timeline.items.expandProducts.title: Expand to new products without starting over
timeline.items.expandProducts.descriptio: The same structure supports different campaigns with minimal changes.
timeline.items.scalableWorkflow.title: Maintain a scalable workflow
timeline.items.scalableWorkflow.descript: With reusable components, design and development follow a fast, predictable process.
